title: Permutations
problem_statement: Given an array nums of distinct integers, return all possible permutations in any order.
intuition: Use backtracking to choose an unused number at each position until the permutation is complete.

approaches.name: DFS with Used Array
approaches.description: Mark numbers as used while building the current permutation and backtrack when the permutation is complete.

interview_qa.q: Why use a used array instead of swapping?
interview_qa.a: A used array keeps the code straightforward and avoids in-place mutation when values are needed in original order.

interview_qa.q: What is the time complexity of generating all permutations?
interview_qa.a: There are n! permutations and each takes O(n) to build, so O(n·n!) total.
